snippet.description:
A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

snippet.title: Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
♫ Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love (Lyrics)
⭐ Download/Stream: 

🎤 Lyrics: Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love

[Intro: Pitbull, Chris Brown]
Went from Mr. 305 (Dade County)
To Mr. Worldwide (All around the world, ayy, ayy)
And now we're international, so international (Oh, yeah)
International (Woo), so international

[Verse 1: Pitbull]
You can't catch me, boy (Can't catch me, boy)
I'm overseas at about a hundred G's per show
Don't test me, boy (Don't test me, boy)
'Cause I rap with the best for sure
305 'til the death of me (Yeah)
Cremate my body, let the ocean have what's left of me (Uh-huh)
But for now, forget about that
Blow the whistle, baby, you the referee, dale
[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City, I never sleep (Yeah)
Wild like Los Angeles, my fantasy (Chris Brown, woo)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Oh yeah)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Girl, it's), it's international love (International, oh-oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo!)

[Verse 2: Pitbull]
I don't play football, but I've touched down everywhere, everywhere? Everywhere (Dale)
I don't play baseball, but I've hit a home run everywhere, everywhere (Dale)
I been to countries and cities I can't pronounce and to places on the globe I ain't know existed (Yeah)
In Romania, she pulled me to the side and told me, "Pit, you can have me and my sister" (Woo)
In Lebanon, yeah, the women are bomb
And in Greece, you guessed it, the women are sweet
Been all around the world, but I ain't gon' lie
There's nothin' like Miami's heat, dale (Woo)
[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City, I never sleep (Yeah)
Wild like Los Angeles, my fantasy (Uh-huh, woo)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Woo, oh, yeah)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Girl, it's), it's international love (We're international, oh-oh, that's right)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)

[Verse 3: Pitbull]
Down in DR, they're lookin' for visas
I ain't talkin' credit cards, if you know what I mean (¿Qué lo que?)
Y en Cuba, la cosa está dura
But the women get down, if you know what I mean
En Colombia, the women got everythin' done
But they some of the most beautiful women I've ever seen
In Brazil, they're freaky with big ol' booties
And they thongs, blue, yellow, and green
En L.A., tengo la Mexicana
En New York, tengo la boricua (Dale, nena)
Besito' para toda' la' mujere' en Venezuela (Mwah)
Y en Miami, tengo a cualquiera (Woo)

[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City (Hey), I never sleep
Wild like Los Angeles (Oh-woah), my fantasy (Woo)
Hotter than Miami (You're hotter than Miami), I-I-I feel the heat
Oh-oh-oh-oh (All around the world), it's international love (International, oh-oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)
[Bridge: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
There's not a place
That your love don't affect me, baby
So don't ever change
I'll cross the globe when I'm with you, baby
Hey (Chris Brown)
Oh-woah (This for the women worldwide, that's right, woo)

[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City (Woo), I never sleep (212)
Wild like Los Angeles (L.A., L.A.), my fantasy (310)
Hotter than Miami (You're hotter than Miami), I-I-I feel the heat (305)

[Outro: Chris Brown, Chris Brown & Pitbull, Pitbull]

snippet.title: GROUP - DEEP KALSI | GURLEZ AKHTAR | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Stream "Group": https://orcd.co/group

Bringing together the powerful vocals of Deep Kalsi and Gurlez Akhtar, this commercial Punjabi banger blends romance, attitude, and the realities of a Jatt lifestyle. The song captures the chemistry between a couple caught between love and ongoing rivalries, with Gurlez urging caution while Deep Kalsi stands firm in his fearless ways. Packed with catchy hooks, vibrant Punjabi lyricism, and mass appeal, this track is built for repeat listens and playlist audiences alike.

#deepkalsi  #gurlezakhtar  #newpunjabisong 

Audio Credits:
Artist - Deep Kalsi ft. Gurlez Akhtar
Music Producer: Sickedge
Mix & Master Services: Ashock
Writer: Sickegde

Video Credits:
Directot/DOP: Sam Malhi
Editor: GS Bhari
VFX: Gagan Matharoo
Colourist: Onkar Singh
Video: PGP Square
Project Supervisor: Sachin Shah
Production Head: Tara
Styled by @robertson_lyngdoh_
Assisted by @b1ue.side @raghvisarda 
Wearing @nm_design_studio @sasa.studio2025
@Evemen.co @farakwear
@orionzjewel

Artwork and Digital Assets: The Indian Doodler (the_indiandoodler_)

Lyrics: 
Channa kithe ae tu karda ae ki ve
Mera lagda na  bin tere jee ve
Call meri ve tu waiting ch rakhdaa
Aunda milan na dass kra’n ki ve

Gaddi moddi si ni ikko tere bol te
Haak maarli yaara ne pehle mod te
Kehnde antiya di bhaaji ajj modni 
Kaand hogya steel aale road te

O Tere nitt de ne raule,
Ithe pahgye ne dhaule
Kyu ni chalda tu vich mere Kehne


O darya na kar mithiye, vair jatta’n de hunde aa vaang gehne


meriyaa’n galla’n to’n katra naa
Aive’n charh di jawani agg la na
Kadd ke sandookh vicho laegya dunali
ajj fer mera paara ja vadha na

O Kahto hundi aive’n billo irritate ni
Para vadheya te kar meditate ni
Uche TC aale baer jaanda tod da
Pakki sheyahi jea bol na slate ni

Ve tu chad tere haade
Jaan tang na kinaare
Case sambhne ta menu baad ch paine

 O chad deve tu sohneya, pange navya groupa naal laene

O darya na kar mithiye, vair jatta’n de hunde a vaang gehne

O Rehna yaara vich time nio kad’da
Te mai antia’n di  jadda’n firra’n Vad da
Khaer tereya’n saaha’n di rehndi mangdi
te mai yuvi vangu field te charhd da
 

O Dass paeri tera pava, jake mummy nu mai kahva’n
Paar hor ni mai adia’n de sehne

O chad deve tu sohneya, pange navya groupa naal laene

O darya na kr mithiye, vair jatta de hunde a vaang gehne


Follow Deep Kalsi on:
Instagram -  https://www.instagram.com/deepkalsimusic/?hl=en

snippet.title: Tom Holland Reacts to Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey Trailer
snippet.description:
Join this channel to get early access to episodes, ad-free watching, and priority access to our live events:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCUYK0BJZF3yNb2fw1EdAXUQ/join

Tom Holland reacts to the trailers for Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey, unpacking the myth, history, and symbolism behind Homer’s great epic. From the fall of Troy and the Trojan Horse to Odysseus’s desperate journey home to Ithaca, Tom explores why this ancient story is such a perfect fit for Nolan’s fascination with time, memory, fate, and fractured narratives. He also looks at the film’s major characters, including Penelope, Telemachus, Athena, Antinous, Agamemnon, and the Cyclops Polyphemus, while explaining what each reveals about the world of the Odyssey. With its IMAX scale, mythic action, and one of the greatest stories ever told, Nolan’s adaptation could be one of the cinematic events of the year.

Book your tickets to Christopher Nolan’s the Odyssey, in cinemas July 17th. In partnership with NBCUniversal.

snippet.title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure 2nd & 3rd Stage (all 11 episodes) will premiere on Netflix each Friday, starting on September 25.

A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles—the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must make their way through, is home to the dreaded area known as the “Devil’s Palm.”
As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.
